Gold is one of the oldest forms of saving and investment known to humans. Even today, people across the world trust gold because it has lasting value.In modern times, however, gold is no longer only physical. With technology, we now have digital gold, which changes how people buy and store it.Difference Between Traditional Gold and Digital GoldBasisTraditional GoldDigital GoldFormPhysical (can touch and see)Virtual (exists online)StorageKept at home or bank lockerStored in secure vaults by companiesSafetyRisk of theft or lossSafer from theft but depends on platform securityEase of BuyingMust visit jewellery shopCan buy anytime using mobile appsMinimum InvestmentUsually higher (buying coins/ jewellery)Very small amounts possibleUsageCan wear and useCannot be used physicallyExtra CostsMaking charges in jewelleryUsually lower extra costsDependence on TechnologyNoYes (internet/apps required)Why Do People Invest in Gold?Gold is considered a stable and reliable asset. People invest in it for the following reasons:Safety- Gold is often stable during economic problems.Value Storage- It helps preserve wealth over long periods.Universal Demand- Gold is used globally in jewellery, technology and industries.Diversification- People spread their investments to reduce risk—gold is one such option.Mini Research Task Find out the current price of gold (Use internet / newspaper)Identify one app that offers digital gold Now answer:How often does the gold price change?Why do you think prices increase or decrease?
